Interface IPythonAdapterFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control python adapter function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("C9F2F0EB-F6FE-4816-BA9D-92C10F659D87")]
public interface IPythonAdapterFunctionArguments

Properties

Attributes

Attributes of the python class.

IPropertySet Attributes { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClassName

The name of the python class that implements the raster function. If unspecified, it's assumed that the class name matches the name of the python module.

string ClassName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ParameterInfo

Input parameters required by the python raster function.

object ParameterInfo { get; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

PythonModule

The python module file path.

string PythonModule { get; set; }

Property Value

string
